payload.title: How Lyft Built a Self-Serve AI Agent Platform with LangGraph and LangSmith
payload.fact: Lyft used LangGraph and LangSmith to build a self-serve AI agent platform for customer support, reducing agent development time from months to weeks.
supporting_evidence: Lyft used LangGraph and LangSmith to build a self-serve AI agent platform for customer support
Cutting agent development from months to weeks

payload.title: Introducing Langsmith Engine
payload.fact: LangSmith Engine monitors production traces, clusters failures into named issues, and proposes targeted fixes and evaluation coverage.
supporting_evidence: LangSmith Engine watches your production traces
Clusters failures into named issues
Proposes targeted fixes and eval coverage

payload.title: Introducing Rubrics: Build Agents that Evaluate and Correct Their Work
payload.fact: Deep Agents' RubricMiddleware adds a self-evaluation loop to agent runs, allowing configuration of rubrics and graders for reliable task outputs.
supporting_evidence: Deep Agents' RubricMiddleware adds a self-evaluation loop to your agent runs
Set a rubric, configure a grader, and get reliable outputs on tasks where correctness matters

payload.title: Give your agent its own computer
payload.fact: LangChain highlighted the complexity of running code execution in AI agents, emphasizing the need for a real computer environment with filesystem, shell, package manager, and persistent state.
supporting_evidence: Running code execution in an AI agent is harder than it looks
Your agent needs a real computer (filesystem, shell, package manager, persistent state)

payload.title: June 2026: LangChain Newsletter — Fleet On-Call Copilot, Deep Agents Rubrics, and More
payload.fact: LangSmith introduced a Fleet on-call copilot for alert triage, computer use for agents, voice trace debugging, and experiment status tracking.
supporting_evidence: New in LangSmith: a Fleet on-call copilot for alert triage
Computer use for agents
Voice trace debugging and experiment status tracking

payload.title: Prompt Caching with Deep Agents
payload.fact: Deep Agents uses prompt caching to reduce LLM token costs by up to 80% across every major model provider without extra configuration.
supporting_evidence: Deep Agents uses prompt caching to cut LLM token costs by up to 80%
Across every major model provider
No extra config required

payload.title: How we built SmithDB’s inverted index for full-text search
payload.fact: LangChain developed full-text search in SmithDB using inverted indexes and routing queries across local SSD and object storage.
supporting_evidence: LangChain built full-text search in SmithDB
Constructing and compacting inverted indexes
Routing queries across local SSD and object storage

payload.title: We built SmithDB, the data layer for agent observability
payload.fact: LangChain introduced SmithDB, a distributed database for agent observability, delivering up to 12x faster performance with full portability.
supporting_evidence: Introducing SmithDB: LangSmith's purpose-built distributed database for agent observability
Delivering up to 12x faster performance
Full portability
